settings.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your print farm. Start free, upgrade when you need more.

settings.name: Community
settings.description: Open source ERP for small print farms
settings.features: Products, BOMs, Inventory|Sales & Production Orders|MRP & Capacity Planning|Self-hosted|Community support

settings.name: PRO
settings.description: Everything you need to run a professional print farm
settings.features: Everything in Community|B2B Customer Portal|Quote Engine|GL Accounting & Schedule C|Shopify Sync|QuickBooks Export|Email Support

settings.name: PRO+
settings.description: Fleet management and automation for scaling operations
settings.features: Everything in PRO|Printer Fleet Management|Maintenance Scheduling|AI Agents (3)|Advanced Analytics

settings.name: Enterprise
settings.features: Everything in PRO+|Full AI Suite (11 agents)|Custom Integrations|SSO & Audit Logging|Priority Support & SLA|Dedicated Account Manager
